SEARCH
程序包 com.example.syntaxappproject

类 Invitation

java.lang.Object
com.example.syntaxappproject.Invitation
public class Invitation extends Object
Model class that represents an invitation sent to an entrant for an event.

Invitations are used for two main scenarios:

  • Lottery Wins: When an entrant is selected through the lottery system, they receive a "lottery_win" invitation to sign up for the event.
  • Private Events: When an organizer invites specific entrants to a private event, they receive a "private_event" invitation to join the waitlist.

Each invitation tracks the entrant's response (accept/decline) and maintains a status field that can be one of:

  • pending - Invitation sent, awaiting user response
  • accepted - User accepted the invitation
  • declined - User declined the invitation
  • not_chosen - Used for lottery losers (notification only)

Outstanding issues:

  • Currently only one pending invitation is shown in the UI at a time
  • Organizer-side invitation creation is handled separately in PrivateEventInvitationRepository and EventLotteryRepository
另请参阅:
  • PrivateEventInvitationRepository
  • EventLotteryRepository
  • 引用无效 
    ui.NotificationFragment

  • 构造器概要

    构造器
    构造器
    说明
    Invitation()
    Empty constructor required by Firestore for deserialization.
    Invitation(String invitationId, String eventId, String eventName, String userId, String status, com.google.firebase.Timestamp invitedAt, com.google.firebase.Timestamp responseAt)
    Constructor used when creating an invitation object manually.

    方法
    说明
    String
    getEventId()
    Returns the Firestore document ID of the event this invitation is for.

    Returns the name of the event (denormalized for display purposes).

    Returns the Firestore document ID of this invitation.

    Returns the timestamp when the invitation was sent.
    com.google.firebase.Timestamp

    Returns the timestamp when the user responded to the invitation.

    Returns the current status of the invitation.
    String
    getType()
    Returns the type of invitation.
    String
    getUserId()
    Returns the ID of the user receiving this invitation.

    Sets the Firestore document ID of the event this invitation is for.

    Sets the name of the event.
    void

    Sets the Firestore document ID of this invitation.
    void

    Sets the timestamp when the invitation was sent.
    void
    setResponseAt(com.google.firebase.Timestamp responseAt)
    Sets the timestamp when the user responded to the invitation.
    void
    setStatus(String status)
    Sets the current status of the invitation.
    void

    Sets the type of invitation.
    void

    Sets the ID of the user receiving this invitation.

    从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • 构造器详细资料

    • Invitation

      public Invitation()
      Empty constructor required by Firestore for deserialization. Firestore uses this constructor to create Invitation objects from document data.

    • Invitation

      public Invitation(String invitationId, String eventId, String eventName, String userId, String status, com.google.firebase.Timestamp invitedAt, com.google.firebase.Timestamp responseAt)
      Constructor used when creating an invitation object manually.
      参数:
      invitationId - the Firestore document ID (can be null, will be set after save)
      eventId - the ID of the event this invitation is for
      eventName - the name of the event (denormalized for display)
      userId - the ID of the invited user
      status - the invitation status (pending, accepted, declined)
      invitedAt - the timestamp when the invitation was sent
      responseAt - the timestamp when the user responded (null if no response)

  • 方法详细资料

    • getInvitationId

      public String getInvitationId()
      Returns the Firestore document ID of this invitation.
      返回:
      the invitation ID

    • setInvitationId

      public void setInvitationId(String invitationId)
      Sets the Firestore document ID of this invitation. Typically called after the invitation is saved to Firestore.
      参数:
      invitationId - the invitation ID to set

    • getEventId

      public String getEventId()
      Returns the Firestore document ID of the event this invitation is for.
      返回:
      the event ID

    • setEventId

      public void setEventId(String eventId)
      Sets the Firestore document ID of the event this invitation is for.
      参数:
      eventId - the event ID to set

    • getEventName

      public String getEventName()
      Returns the name of the event (denormalized for display purposes).
      返回:
      the event name

    • setEventName

      public void setEventName(String eventName)
      Sets the name of the event.
      参数:
      eventName - the event name to set

    • getUserId

      public String getUserId()
      Returns the ID of the user receiving this invitation.
      返回:
      the user ID

    • setUserId

      public void setUserId(String userId)
      Sets the ID of the user receiving this invitation.
      参数:
      userId - the user ID to set

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()
      Returns the current status of the invitation. Possible values: "pending", "accepted", "declined", "not_chosen".
      返回:
      the invitation status

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(String status)
      Sets the current status of the invitation.
      参数:
      status - the invitation status to set

    • getInvitedAt

      public com.google.firebase.Timestamp getInvitedAt()
      Returns the timestamp when the invitation was sent.
      返回:
      the invitation timestamp

    • setInvitedAt

      public void setInvitedAt(com.google.firebase.Timestamp invitedAt)
      Sets the timestamp when the invitation was sent.
      参数:
      invitedAt - the invitation timestamp to set

    • getType

      public String getType()
      Returns the type of invitation. Possible values: "lottery_win" for lottery winner invitations, "private_event" for private event invitations.
      返回:
      the invitation type

    • setType

      public void setType(String type)
      Sets the type of invitation.
      参数:
      type - the invitation type to set ("lottery_win" or "private_event")

    • getResponseAt

      public com.google.firebase.Timestamp getResponseAt()
      Returns the timestamp when the user responded to the invitation. Returns null if the user has not responded yet.
      返回:
      the response timestamp, or null if no response

    • setResponseAt

      public void setResponseAt(com.google.firebase.Timestamp responseAt)
      Sets the timestamp when the user responded to the invitation.
      参数:
      responseAt - the response timestamp to set
